text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, the tryouts—a multitude of races highlighting up-and-coming
students—are being held. This is their chance to get scouted and
make it big.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's still early in the morning, but as I look over at the track, I spy a
student already running laps.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whew! Okay, one more lap—no, ten more laps!
choice_data_list:
Be careful not to overwork yourself right before
the tryouts.

Be careful not to overwork yourself right before
the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No worries! So far, this has been nothing more than a warm-up!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
After all, I'm El Condor Pasa! The racer whose wings are destined to
unfurl and soar across the world some day!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wait! We're totally talkin' like we know each other... Who are you?!
choice_data_list:
I'm just a trainer who's here to watch the
tryouts.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You're a trainer?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case, then could it be... that you've come here to scout
me?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The tryouts haven't even started yet, and you're telling me you've
already got your eye on my ability, talent, and potential?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bueno! I'm glad you came to say hi! I respect your passion and drive!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's not hearing me out!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately, I have to decline your offer for now.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...Why, you ask? Even though you want to scout me right now, why do
I not accept your offer?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The answer is simple! Trainer, I want you to watch me today! Watch me in today's tryouts, and then judge my abilities!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A passionate bond of trust with her trainer is necessary for the world's
strongest racer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's why I want you to judge me properly, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, but you didn't call out to me before the tryouts in vain! ♪ I'll
give you one El point for your troubles!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whoa! It's almost time for my race. Catch ya later—ciao! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa's feet take flight as she dashes away, leaving me
behind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, the tryouts begin in earnest. There, the top-performing runner
is...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasa! She's taken the lead! Nobody can catch up!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: What magnificent form! In first place, El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: La victoria! I'm the best, the greatest, the one to beat all the rest!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She left her competition in the dust in the final stretch! She's head
and shoulders above the competition!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text: Why, we might just have a prodigy in the making on our hands!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Heheheh... I can hear it—the crowd cheerin' for the world's strongest
racer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right, it's scouting time! Which one of you trainers wants to
conquer the world with me?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasa! Please let me scout you!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text: No wait, pick me! I'll give you the wings you need to fly!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ooh, bueno! ♪ Now that's what I like to hear!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But what I'm lookin' for is a partner I can trust! Which means...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: A duel! A contest! It's time for the Scouting Championship!

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text: The Scouting Championship?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sí! When it comes to trainers, it's their training programs that count!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I want each of you to come up with a training program fit
for me—the world's strongest racer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And if I vibe enough with one of your programs, then I'll accept the
scoutin' offer from the trainer who came up with it!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text: I see... It's a training program showdown!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Challenge accepted! I'll come up with the perfect program for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The trainers around El Condor Pasa soon disperse, leaving only me
standing in front of her.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And lastly, we have... you! The trainer who was overflowing with
passion!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: How-ever! Unfortunately for you, I'm not giving you special treatment.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That said... just between you and me, I'm really lookin' forward to
whatever training program you come up with! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You did cut the line and try to scout me before I even raced, after all.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I expect great things, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I get to work drafting up a training program for El Condor
Pasa.
